cases.description: EXACT is case-sensitive: differing case alone makes two otherwise-identical strings unequal
EXACT is sensitive to spacing differences, matching Microsoft's own documented example
cases.expected_note: Source: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/exact-function-d3087698-fc15-4a15-9631-12575cf29926 - documented example compares 'w ord' vs 'word' -> FALSE

cases.description: EXACT also accepts numeric values directly; identical numbers compare equal
